How to Write a Perfect Congratulations Card

30 real congratulations messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Congratulations Template

1 30 Congratulations Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a congratulations template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
🎉 Congratulations! You absolutely deserve this win. 🏆
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
Well done! All your hard work finally paid off. 🙌✨
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
So proud of you. Huge congratulations! 🥳
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
You did it! This is just the start. Huge congrats. 🚀
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Cheers to you — congratulations on this amazing milestone. 🥂
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Congratulations! The future just got a whole lot brighter for you. 🌟
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
Congratulations, beautiful! You smashed it. So proud of you. 💖👑
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
To my girl — you earned every bit of this. Congratulations, baby! 🌹🥇
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
Congratulations, gorgeous! I always knew you could do it. 💫✨
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
Yes! You crushed it. Congratulations, my love. 💐🎊
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
So proud to call you mine. Congratulations, babe. 💕🏆
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
Congratulations! Today's all about YOU. 💐🎉
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Congratulations, man. You earned every drop of this. 🏅💪
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
Yes! You crushed that. So proud of you, bro. 🏆😎
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Well done, handsome. Knew you had it in you. 💙🚀
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Congratulations, babe. Watching you win never gets old. 🔥🥇
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
You deserve the world and more. Congratulations! 💙✨
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
Total legend behaviour. Congratulations, dude! 🎸🤙
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations to my favourite person! We're all bursting with pride. 💛🧨
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
So proud of you. Congratulations from the whole family! 🥂❤️
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
To the newest graduate/promotee/new homeowner — huge congratulations! 🎓🏡✨
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
Your success is our success. Congratulations, we love you! 💗👏
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations! Every family dinner from now on is about this story. 🍽️😆❤️
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
Mom/Dad/Sis/Bro — you did it! So proud. Congratulations! 🏆💙
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Congratulations, bestie! This calls for shots. 🍸🎉
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
So proud of you, mate. You absolutely crushed it. Drinks on me! 🍻🏆
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
Congratulations! And to think I knew you when… 😜✨
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
This is the first of MANY wins for you. Huge congrats, buddy. 🚀🧡
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
You weirdo did it! Congratulations. I always believed. 😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Dude! You deserve this and so much more. Congratulations! 🥳💯
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Congratulations Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Explain WHY this win was inevitable for them (specific strengths).
  2. 💡 Reference the struggle: 'I saw how many late nights you put in…'
  3. 💡 Name something cool this now enables ('Now we can finally go on that trip!').
  4. 💡 If multiple audience (family, work), tailor each part; if just friend, roast lightly then praise.
  5. 💡 Avoid humblebrag adjacent language ('I always said you were good for something').

3 Bad vs Good: Congratulations Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Congrats! 🎉
✅ Write this instead
CONGRATULATIONS ON THE PROMOTION! I saw how many late nights you put in. Nobody deserves this more. CHAMPAGNE TONIGHT 🍾
❌ Don't write this
Well done on your achievement.
✅ Write this instead
First your degree, then your first house, now this. You, friend, are on a LEGENDARY streak. So proud.
❌ Don't write this
Good job!
✅ Write this instead
Good job?! This is life-changing. You just levelled UP. I'm screaming. Congratulations, you absolute genius!

4 Congratulations Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing congratulations cards.

Short or long — which wins for congratulations?

SHORT + EXCITED. All caps, emoji, exclamation points are ENCOURAGED here. This is not the time for subtlety. 🎉

Should I reference the struggle?

Yes — briefly. "I saw how late you stayed" > "I always knew you could do it". Witness the grind = genuine praise.

Is humblebragging okay? ("I knew it first!")

1 line maximum. Then pivot back to THEM. This isn't about how smart YOU were for predicting their win.

Different tone for friend vs colleague?

Friend: roast first, praise after. Colleague: professional + warm. Keep it appropriate but not cold.

5 Pick a Congratulations Template & Send in 60 Seconds
